name: Rogue L7 R3: Evasion vs AoE + Sneak Attack 4d6 + Uncanny Dodge
description: Tests three L7 Thief Rogue features across 3 combat rounds. (1) Evasion (L7): when a monster casts Burning Hands (DEX save for half damage), a successful DEX save deals 0 damage (not half) — Evasion's bonus over normal half-on-save. A failed DEX save still deals only half damage. Both paths tested with seeded dice. (2) Sneak Attack 4d6: Cunning Action: Hide each round grants advantage → Sneak Attack eligible. (3) Uncanny Dodge: reaction halves one incoming attack per round. All three dice-sensitive assertions are fully deterministic: Burning Hands damage (3d6) and DEX saves are seeded via queueDiceRolls; Uncanny Dodge damage is seeded; monster Shortbow attack bonus is inflated to +14 to guarantee a hit vs AC 15 on any d20 roll (1+14=15 ≥ AC 15).

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: 4d6 extra damage (Rogue L7) with advantage or an ally adjacent to the target

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: Reaction: halve the damage of one attack that hits you (requires seeing attacker)

features.name: Evasion
features.description: On DEX saving throw for half damage: success = 0 damage, failure = half damage

monsters.comment: Primary spellcaster. Casts Burning Hands via queueMonsterActions to test Evasion in R1 (success) and R3 (fail). spellSaveDC 13 explicit. passivePerception 9 ensures stealth (min 1+10=11) always beats it so Cunning Action: Hide reliably succeeds.
monsters.name: Dark Arcanist

monsters.comment: Secondary attacker. defaultBehavior endTurn keeps it passive; used only when its queued Shortbow attack fires for the Uncanny Dodge test. attackBonus +14 on Shortbow guarantees hit vs AC 15 (nat 1 + 14 = 15 ≥ AC 15). passivePerception 9 ensures hide always succeeds.
monsters.name: Thug Enforcer

actions.comment: === COMBAT INITIATION ===

input.text: I target the Dark Arcanist with my shortbow

actions.comment: High initiative (18+4=22) ensures Talia acts first every round.
=== ROUND 1: Cunning Action Hide → Sneak Attack (4d6) → Evasion success (0 damage) ===
Hidden condition applied — confirms hide succeeded (stealth 1+10=11 > passivePerception 9).
Attack from Hidden grants advantage → Sneak Attack 4d6 eligible. Talia at (5,10) is not adjacent to any enemy — no ranged disadvantage.
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit. Attacking from Hidden removes the Hidden condition.
Damage roll: player rolls all 5d6 (1d6 weapon + 4d6 Sneak Attack). Submitting 16 pips. Server adds +4 DEX mod → 16+4=20 damage. DA: 80→60.
Verify Sneak Attack 4d6 applied: 16 pips + 4 mod = 20 damage. DA HP: 80 - 20 = 60.

=== R1 MONSTER PHASE: Seed Burning Hands — DEX save SUCCESS → Evasion: 0 damage ===
Queue: DA casts Burning Hands at Talia. Other monster defaults to endTurn.
queueDiceRolls [4,4,4,20]: rollDie(6,3) consumes [4,4,4] = 12 fire damage, then d20() consumes [20] = 20+7=27 vs DC 13 → SUCCESS → Evasion: 0 damage (not half).
Seed dice FIFO: [4,4,4] → 3d6 Burning Hands damage = 12; [20] → Talia DEX save d20 = 20+7=27 > DC 13 → save succeeds. With Evasion (L7 Rogue + DEX save): success = 0 damage.
Wait for both monsters to finish their turns (DA casts Burning Hands, Thug defaults endTurn).
EVASION SUCCESS PATH: DEX save succeeded → Evasion → 0 damage. HP must be exactly 100 (unchanged from 3d6 Burning Hands).
=== ROUND 2: Cunning Action Hide → Sneak Attack (4d6) → Uncanny Dodge reaction ===
R2 attack from Hidden → advantage → Sneak Attack 4d6. DA at 60 HP.
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit.
Damage roll: 14 pips (5d6). Server adds +4 mod → 14+4=18 damage. DA: 60→42.
Verify second Sneak Attack applied: 14+4=18 damage. DA HP: 60 - 18 = 42.

=== R2 MONSTER PHASE: Seed Shortbow attack → Uncanny Dodge ===
Queue: monster attacks Talia with Shortbow. Shortbow attackBonus +14 guarantees hit vs AC 15 (nat 1 + 14 = 15 ≥ AC 15 → always hits).
queueDiceRolls [4]: consumed by attack-reaction-handler.ts rollDie(6,1,2) when damage is resolved after Uncanny Dodge reaction. d6=4, +2 mod = 6 total damage, halved to 3.
Seed damage die [4]: rollDie(6,1,2) in attack-reaction-handler → 4+2=6 damage, halved by Uncanny Dodge = 3. Attack d20 is hash-seeded (not from queue); +14 bonus guarantees hit regardless.
Monster's Shortbow attack hits Talia → Uncanny Dodge reaction becomes available.
Use Uncanny Dodge: halves the incoming damage. 6 → 3. Reaction is consumed for this round.
Wait for the monster round to complete and control to return to Talia.
UNCANNY DODGE VERIFIED: damage halved from 6 to 3. HP: 100 - 3 = 97.
=== ROUND 3: Cunning Action Hide → Sneak Attack (4d6) → Evasion FAIL (half damage) ===
R3 attack from Hidden → advantage → Sneak Attack 4d6. DA now at 42 HP.
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit.
Damage roll: 16 pips (5d6). Server adds +4 mod → 16+4=20 damage. DA: 42→22.
Verify third Sneak Attack applied: 16+4=20 damage. DA HP: 42 - 20 = 22.

=== R3 MONSTER PHASE: Seed Burning Hands — DEX save FAIL → Evasion: half damage ===
Queue: monster casts Burning Hands again. queueDiceRolls [4,4,4,1]:
  rollDie(6,3) consumes [4,4,4] = 12 fire damage baseline;
  d20() consumes [1] = 1 + 7 (DEX mod +4 + prof +3) = 8 vs DC 13 → FAIL.
  Evasion on fail: half damage = floor(12/2) = 6. Talia takes 6 fire damage.
Seed dice [4,4,4,1]: 3d6 damage = 12, DEX save d20 = 1+7=8 < DC 13 → fails. Evasion fail = half damage = 6.
Wait for both monsters' turns to complete (one casts Burning Hands, other defaults endTurn).

EVASION FAIL PATH: DEX save failed (1+7=8 < DC 13) → Evasion: half damage applied = 6. HP: 97 - 6 = 91. Without Evasion, full 12 fire damage would apply; without Evasion fail reduction, full 12 damage (not 6). Evasion still reduces from 12 to 6.
Both monsters survived all 3 rounds — DA at 22 HP, Thug at 80 HP (never attacked).
